texto: One of my dad's friends from the music industry came over to our house one time and heard me sing, and he said, 'She should audition for this role I have!' So I did! It was a movie called 'The Gospel,' which I did when I was five. That was when I was like, 'I want to do this acting thing!'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a China Anne McClain: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “One of my dad's friends from the music industry came over to our house one time and heard me sing…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, music, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e time.

frase_original: One of my dad's friends from the music industry came over to our house one time and heard me sing, and he said, 'She should audition for this role I have!' So I did! It was a movie called 'The Gospel,' which I did when I was five. That was when I was like, 'I want to do this acting thing!'
